notes.title: Path jail is still design-only.
notes.potentialImpact: Users may assume File Read access is already safe.
notes.recommendation: Keep capability disabled until canonicalization and enforcement are implemented.
notes.evidence: Operational Access Audit ADR + Real Access Blocker Closeout.

notes.title: Productive consent remains blocked.
notes.concern: Consent visuals could be mistaken for productive authorization.
notes.potentialImpact: A user may assume a draft consent record permits capability use.
notes.recommendation: Keep consent storage and enforcement separate from visual review.
notes.evidence: Productive Consent Design Review + Consent Governance Closeout.

notes.title: Evidence previews are not source-of-truth.
notes.concern: Static evidence cards can look authoritative.
notes.potentialImpact: Teams may confuse fixture refs with productive verification.
notes.recommendation: Label previews as static and require a future evidence authority design.
notes.evidence: Timeline Evidence Research OS + Static Traceability QA.

notes.title: Visual layer must not imply runtime authority.
notes.concern: Decision and Advisor actions can look executable.
notes.potentialImpact: Users may read visual actions as real approval or execution.
notes.recommendation: Keep every option marked preview-only until a governed milestone exists.
notes.evidence: Mission Control Research OS Layout + Static Decision Advisor QA.

notes.title: Cloud/provider activity remains disabled.
notes.concern: Model and advisor language could imply remote activity.
notes.potentialImpact: The product may appear less local-first than intended.
notes.recommendation: Keep no-cloud and no-provider disclosures visible.
notes.evidence: Access Implementation Checkpoint + Consent Governance Closeout.

notes.title: Mission Control should not become a generic dashboard.
notes.concern: Too many equal cards can flatten mission hierarchy.
notes.potentialImpact: The user may miss the active mission and blocked capabilities.
notes.recommendation: Preserve one dominant mission focus and three secondary panels.
notes.evidence: Visual Reengineering Foundation + Mission Control Research OS Layout.

notes.title: Timeline must not become a simple checklist.
notes.concern: A checklist loses governance and traceability context.
notes.potentialImpact: Evidence, decisions, commits, and tests become visually disconnected.
notes.recommendation: Keep the timeline styled as a research journal and evidence line.
notes.evidence: Timeline Research Journal + Static Traceability QA.

notes.title: Advisor must not become a chatbot.
notes.concern: Chat bubbles would make the Advisor feel conversational instead of architectural.
notes.potentialImpact: Recommendations may be perceived as informal assistant messages.
notes.recommendation: Use editorial notes with severity, evidence refs, and concise recommendations.
